title: Tryonella
taxonomy: Tryonella is a genus of fungi in the family Agaricaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Fungi and contains various species of mushrooms. The classification of Tryonella is further broken down into phylum, class, and order, with the phylum being Ascomycota, class Pezizomycetes, and order Agaricales. The genus Tryonella is closely related to other fungi in the Agaricaceae family, sharing similar characteristics and growth habits. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of Tryonella within the fungal kingdom.
